'''鈭歝h-sh-b-v''' ('''kachashbevoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tink|tink]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-sh-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tink|tink]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-sh-b-v
|-
! Lemma
| kachashbevoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichashbevoko|thichashbevoko]] || [[word:jichashbevoko|jichashbevoko]] || [[word:shichashbevoko|shichashbevoko]] || [[word:kichashbevoko|kichashbevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuchashbevoko|thuthuchashbevoko]] || [[word:jujuchashbevoko|jujuchashbevoko]] || [[word:shushuchashbevoko|shushuchashbevoko]] || [[word:kukuchashbevoko|kukuchashbevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuchashbevoko|thuchashbevoko]] || [[word:juchashbevoko|juchashbevoko]] || [[word:shuchashbevoko|shuchashbevoko]] || [[word:kuchashbevoko|kuchashbevoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuchashbevoko|thuchashbevoko]] || [[word:juchashbevoko|juchashbevoko]] || [[word:shuchashbevoko|shuchashbevoko]] || [[word:kuchashbevoko|kuchashbevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thechashbevoko|thechashbevoko]] || [[word:jechashbevoko|jechashbevoko]] || [[word:shechashbevoko|shechashbevoko]] || [[word:kechashbevoko|kechashbevoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thochashbevoko|thochashbevoko]] || [[word:jochashbevoko|jochashbevoko]] || [[word:shochashbevoko|shochashbevoko]] || [[word:kochashbevoko|kochashbevoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thochashbevoko|thochashbevoko]] || [[word:jochashbevoko|jochashbevoko]] || [[word:shochashbevoko|shochashbevoko]] || [[word:kochashbevoko|kochashbevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙chashbevoko|th忙chashbevoko]] || [[word:j忙chashbevoko|j忙chashbevoko]] || [[word:sh忙chashbevoko|sh忙chashbevoko]] || [[word:k忙chashbevoko|k忙chashbevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathachashbevoko|thathachashbevoko]] || [[word:jajachashbevoko|jajachashbevoko]] || [[word:shashachashbevoko|shashachashbevoko]] || [[word:kakachashbevoko|kakachashbevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thachashbevoko|thachashbevoko]] || [[word:jachashbevoko|jachashbevoko]] || [[word:shachashbevoko|shachashbevoko]] || [[word:kachashbevoko|kachashbevoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thachashbevoko|thachashbevoko]] || [[word:jachashbevoko|jachashbevoko]] || [[word:shachashbevoko|shachashbevoko]] || [[word:kachashbevoko|kachashbevoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shachashbevithi|shachashbevithi]] || [[word:shachashbeviji|shachashbeviji]] || [[word:shachashbevishi|shachashbevishi]] || [[word:shachashbeviki|shachashbeviki]]
